scope.external_gate_still_required: P-core sparse slowdown under concurrent iGPU training must be <= 1.10x

backend.device_policy: exactly one enumerated torch.xpu device and exactly one matching healthy Intel CIM video controller
backend.host_id_derivation: sha256: plus SHA-256 of compact UTF-8 JSON in exact key order UUID,Vendor,Name,IdentifyingNumber after trimming all values and uppercasing UUID from the single live Win32_ComputerSystemProduct record; the live receipt is retained on success, fail-closed identity mismatch, and later numeric rejection
backend.cpu_control_policy: GetSystemCpuSetInformation must reproduce the byte-bound windows-cpu-set-topology-v1 SHA-256, classify exactly 8P+12E without numbering assumptions, and derive the control thread count as the eight live P-core CPU Sets; --cpu-threads is mandatory and must equal that derived and contract-bound value
backend.silent_fallback: forbidden; CPU, CUDA, AUTO, OpenVINO GPU, an ambiguous XPU/CIM mapping, or an identity mismatch emits UNAVAILABLE_FAIL_CLOSED
backend.compile: torch.compile backend=inductor, fullgraph=true, dynamic=false; CPU and XPU controls use the same policy
backend.precision: FP32 only; autocast, TF32 claims, BF16, FP16, and INT8 are outside this probe

hashstem.source_snapshot_requirement: exact JSON types and values from the hashstem_master.jl exporter contract: schema=learned-hashstem-snapshot-source-v1, exact hashstem_schema, status=UNEXECUTED_STATIC_ONLY, immutable_source=true, openvino_compiled=false, publish_authorized=false, weights_file=hashstem_snapshot_weights.npz, source_checkpoint_manifest_sha256 equal to the bound master manifest, and an explicitly supplied byte-bound NPZ whose every FP32 array is bitwise identical to the source master; JSON numeric 1/0 cannot substitute for booleans

optimizer.name: AdamW
optimizer.initial_state: empty because only a version-zero CPU master is accepted

hashstem.loss: sum(output * pre-masked output_cotangent) plus auxiliary_weight times masked Huber over output columns 193:202 (Julia one-based)
hashstem.normalization: frozen input_mean and input_inv_std buffers, never optimizer parameters

witness.teacher_v3_policy: teacher_v3_train requires a byte-bound dataset manifest and teacher_split=train
witness.synthetic_policy: synthetic witness requires a bound generator source and seed_namespace=synthetic_component_only_no_game_rng
witness.mask_policy: output_cotangent and auxiliary_mask are already multiplied by state_mask; masked rows must be exactly zero
witness.cpu_reference: the first batch reference output/loss/gradients/updated weights must be exported from the bound CPU master with the exact loss and AdamW contract

timing.percentile: nearest-rank p50 and p95 without interpolation
timing.compile: wrapper construction and first fixed-shape forward/backward compilation are reported separately and excluded from steady-state percentiles
timing.end_to_end_boundary: host-resident fixed batch before transfer through copied FP32 output/loss after optimizer publication and explicit synchronization
timing.updates_per_second: timed updates divided by the sum of raw total QPC intervals; reported only as supplemental throughput and never used for the authoritative speed gate
timing.raw_receipt: every per-update stage interval remains in the result artifact

ram_contention_receipt.sampling_scope: component process and host physical-memory pressure only
ram_contention_receipt.limitations: this receipt is not DRAM-bandwidth or P-core sparse contention evidence; the independent ETW/IMC integrated gate remains mandatory

requirements: saved model and AdamW tensors reload with identical dtype, shape, and raw contiguous CPU bytes; value equality is insufficient because signed zero and NaN payloads are bit patterns
probe master and snapshot weight archives are byte-identical
probe master version and optimizer step advance together by exactly one
candidate snapshot binds the advanced probe master version
publication and production continuation remain unauthorized

prohibited_claims: pure CPU dynamic sparse model improved
